body.title: Fix hardcoded ~/TheIgors paths across devices
body.result: replaced .TheIgors path refs with .unseen_university across channel.py, db_proxy.py, debug_extractor.py, book_learner.py and others
body.description:
Path rename cleanup: 14 files still reference hardcoded ~/TheIgors/ which no longer matches repo location. Changes already in working tree (unstaged). Affected: push_sources.py, system_prompt.py, filesystem.py, goal_continuation.py, ops.py, runner.py, inference/device.py, minion/device.py, debug_extractor.py, decision_manager.py, rotate_igor_console.py, palace_seed_decisions.py, test_consult_primitive.py, test_web_chat_swadl_smoke.py.

**Affected files:** all listed above
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; use Path.home() or env vars instead of hardcoded ~/TheIgors
**Scope boundary:** IN: replace all ~/TheIgors hardcoded references with Path.home()/'dev/src/UnseenUniversity' or env-var equivalents. OUT: moving files, updating git config, changing palace nodes.
**Completion criteria:** no source file references ~/TheIgors/ as a hardcoded path; all tests pass
